topic: Review F010 design decisions for sync compiler

messages.content: How should we set the budget for garage sync? Claude Code's CLAUDE.md is recommended ≤ 5KB but I want to fit a few more entries.

Going with 16KB budget — about 3.2x the recommended single-file limit, gives long-form knowledge entries headroom while staying within typical context window. We'll truncate per-entry to 200 chars and emit stderr warning when budget is exceeded.
Ranking: decision > solution > pattern; same-kind by date DESC; experience separately top-5 by mtime DESC.
